claim_boundary: The route proves current lifecycle ordering, lightweight inactive optimization, bounded hard-equivalent process choice when activated, post-change routing, and independent source/shadow/formal/install/skill/Git freshness; sibling semantics, global optimality, and external publication authority remain separate.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: flowguard-development-process-flow owns every check's domain meaning; SkillGuard only reconciles the exact current declared-check inventory and terminal receipts in one fixed enforced closure.

functions.business_intent: Order non-trivial development actions, keep ordinary work lightweight, conditionally select a hard-equivalent lower-rework process shape, and keep evidence current across diagnosis, root-cause repair, peer writes, install, and closure.
Compile a rough non-trivial plan into plane-safe steps, gates, failure branches, and evidence requirements.
Rehearse a selected AI-operation workflow while keeping product commitments as typed target context.

action.summary: Classify development-process ownership and retain product or agent commitments only as typed targets.
Run the existing lifecycle simulator with a zero-ceremony inactive path, conditional hard-equivalent process optimization, continue/rework, peer-write, install, and background-liveness gates.
Accept closure only from current final receipts; progress-only evidence remains liveness.
Classify the internal plan-detailing route and its typed planning inputs.
Compile the rough plan through the DevelopmentProcessFlow-owned internal route.
Close plan detailing only on current route-specific evidence.
Classify the internal agent-workflow route and its typed operational inputs.
Rehearse the selected agent workflow through the DevelopmentProcessFlow-owned internal route.
Close agent-workflow rehearsal only on current route-specific evidence.
